title: advanced_little_garbage
description: Added some small gadgets for other mods
body:
# ALG
## Exposition + This mod added some new items to certain mod,mainly for creative mode
Here is the list of mods in which this mod added items :
  1. Draconic Evolution














#### If you have any ideas about adding items to other mods ,please report issues to my Github

Draconic Evolution

Back to the Top
Item DisplayName Item ID Item Effect Comments
Creative Energy Core create_energy_core - only used in crafting
Creative Energy Module item_create_energy Put the module into the config slot to provide infinte energy only used in the chaotic items
Creative Shield Control Module item_create_shield_control Directly set the shield current capacity to max capacity
  • only used in the chaotic items
  • When Creative Energy Core and Creative Huge Shield Enhance Module coexists, the item electric value bar will shake back and forth between 0 and max value about 1-2s
Creative Huge Shield Enhance Module item_create_large_shield_capacity Directly set shield capacity to 2147483646 only used in the chaotic items
Creative Auto_feed Module item_create_auto_feed Directly set the storable food point to 2147483646 only used in the chaotic items
Creative Damage Module item_create_damage No need to charge ,Directly set damage to 2147483647 only used in the chaotic items
Creative Projectile Module item_create_projectile
  • provide +2147483646% Base Damage
  • provide +1600% Velocity
  • provide +1600% Penetration Chance
  • provide +100% Gravity Cancellation
  • provide -100% Inaccuracy
  • only used in the chaotic items
  • No need to charge when the Creative Energy Module exists
Chaotic Auto_Feed Module item_chaotic_auto_feed provide 1500 points of storable food only used in the chaotic items
